prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为高热推荐专业，计算机类为推荐专 业，与重庆大学优势工科方向高度契合；新疆2025年理科考生52538人，2026年总考生约238000人，按近年理科占比约68%估算，2026年理科考生约16.2万人，较 2025年大幅增长，竞争压力显著加大；重庆大学位于重庆市，属西南地区，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生 计划占比较小（约64人），属跨省招生常规规模。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 2394 → 1869 → 1673, moving forward for three consecutive years, with a cumulative advance of about 721 places, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1673; the provincial science enrollment plan was 69 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 64 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 64, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 34th in the main list of Chinese universities by Soft Science (stable at 33–34 from 2021 to 2026), belonging to top domestic comprehensive universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering received A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, with flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering strongly attracting science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are high-heat recommended majors, Computer Science is a recommended major, highly aligned with Chongqing University's advantageous engineering fields; Xinjiang's 2025 science examinees number 52,538, and the total examinees in 2026 are about 238,000, with science students estimated at about 68%, so the 2026 science examinees are approximately 162,000, a significant increase from 2025, greatly intensifying competition; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, in the southwest region, with some regional appeal to Xinjiang students; the university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 64 students), a normal scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the substantial increase in Xinjiang examinees (intensifying competition), and the mild suppression from the slightly negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 1673, competition is expected to continue intensifying; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for science is about 1643, with a range of 1397–1889.

If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1397), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science); if ranking is near the upper limit (>1889), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 minimum liberal arts rankings approximately 557→479→501, with slight backward fluctuation in recent years, fluctuation range about 78 places in the past 3 years; 2025 baseline ranking approximately 501; provincial liberal arts enrollment plan: 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, 4 in 2025; 2026 plan 8, doubling compared to 2025 (+100%), significant expansion, competition pressure noticeably eased.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, strong comprehensive strength; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative (laboratory explosion accident), may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity relatively high (ranked 23rd overall); among liberal arts-related disciplines, Marxist Theory (key discipline on campus), etc.; Chongqing University is strong in engineering, liberal arts programs are relatively small but rely on the 985 platform.

预测结论.text: Considering the bidirectional effects of historical ranking fluctuations, the doubling of the 2026 enrollment plan (significantly easing competition), and the increase in Xinjiang examinee numbers (intensifying competition), the expansion effect dominates; based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 501, the ranking is expected to shift backward; predicted 2026 minimum liberal arts ranking approximately 832, range 707–957.
